text:
Assistant: I'll enable code signing for device deployment while keeping the build simulator-compatible (automatic signing works for both). [...] Assistant: Need `-allowProvisioningUpdates` so Xcode can generate the provisioning profile automatically. [...] Assistant: Xcode has no Apple ID account signed in, so it can't mint a provisioning profile for team C99QRJCR43 — this needs an interactive sign-in (2FA), which I can't do for you. I'll open Xcode's Accounts settings so you can sign in.

Assistant: Xcode's Settings should now be open. Please click the **Accounts** tab and sign in with the Apple ID tied to team `C99QRJCR43` (Pablo Fernandez) — 2FA may prompt on your phone/other device. Let me know once you're signed in and I'll continue the build and deploy to your iPhone.
